scripts.android: bun run sync:android && bun run open:android
scripts.ios: bun run sync:ios && bun run open:ios
scripts.android:debug: bun run sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug && cd .. && mkdir -p artifacts/android && cp android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk artifacts/android/litomi-debug.apk && shasum -a 256 artifacts/android/litomi-debug.apk > artifacts/android/litomi-debug.apk.sha256
scripts.android:release: bun run sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew :app:assembleRelease && cd .. && mkdir -p artifacts/android && cp android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk artifacts/android/litomi.apk && shasum -a 256 artifacts/android/litomi.apk > artifacts/android/litomi.apk.sha256
